headline: Southside Savages: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Southside Savages is projected #9 of 16 with a 78.22 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Drake Maye, Josh Jacobs, and Tetairoa McMillan. The immediate priority is improving the TE slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On October 14, Southside Savages traded with Roster 3 and acquired Tetairoa McMillan while sending 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages), 2026 Round 2 (Southside Savages). Tetairoa McMillan is now the current WR starter at 85.6 C-AVI and 87.2 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the TE slot above Colby Parkinson's 45.3 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 51.6 C-AVI would directly attack the 0.03-point projected gap to All Hail King Jesus.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On June 24, Badland Banditos traded with Crimson Tide Pods and acquired Kenneth Walker, 2027 Round 3 (Crimson Tide Pods) while sending Chris Rodriguez, 2026 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2026 Round 1 (All Hail King Jesus). Kenneth Walker is now the current RB starter at 87.5 C-AVI and 87.0 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #9 of 16 at 78.22 lineup C-AVI. All Hail King Jesus is immediately above at 78.25, a gap of 0.03. Badland Banditos is immediately behind at 77.33.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Drake Maye (98.3), Josh Jacobs (87.9), and Tetairoa McMillan (85.6).
